summary: Globex Auto Feature Testing (Iteration 55) - All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed. Feature working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/trading-calendar/status returns globex_auto field with ok, enabled, reason
✅ GET /api/trading-calendar/status returns nyse_auto field with ok, reason
✅ POST /api/autotrading/config with {globex_auto_enabled: true} enables Globex Auto
✅ After enabling Globex Auto, GET /api/trading-calendar/status returns can_trade=true and status=OPEN during Globex hours (~00:16 ET)
✅ After enabling Globex Auto, session_type is 'globex' (not 'nyse')
✅ POST /api/autotrading/config with {globex_auto_enabled: false} disables Globex Auto
✅ After disabling Globex Auto, can_trade is false during non-NYSE hours
✅ GET /api/autotrading/config returns globex_auto_enabled and globex_flatten_before_ny_minutes fields
✅ Frontend: Globex Auto button exists in Auto Trading panel with data-testid='globex-auto-btn'
✅ Frontend: Clicking Globex Auto button toggles cyan highlight style
✅ Frontend: When Globex Auto enabled, info box shows '18:00 ET → 09:25 ET' text
✅ Frontend: When Globex Auto enabled, flatten minutes input appears with data-testid='globex-flatten-minutes-input'
✅ Frontend: Trading status shows 'Sessao: closed' and 'Exchange: Fechado' when Globex disabled (correct behavior)
critical_code_review_comments: AutoTradingConfig model (line 285): globex_auto_enabled and globex_flatten_before_ny_minutes fields properly defined with defaults
Trading status endpoint (line 4909-4981): Correctly combines NYSE Auto OR Globex Auto logic with session_type and exchange_status
is_within_globex_auto_hours() (line 194-260): Properly handles weekends, daily halt (17:00-18:00 ET), holidays, and RTH collision guard
Hours guard fallback (lines 6084-6085, 7508-7509): Correctly falls back to Globex hours when NYSE hours fail and globex_auto_enabled
Frontend App.js (line 928): Globex Auto button with proper data-testid and cyan toggle styling
Frontend App.js (line 938-941): Globex info box shows session hours and description
Frontend App.js (line 960-967): Globex flatten minutes input conditionally rendered when Globex enabled

test_credentials.note: Used for API tests and Playwright authentication

seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing autotrading_config collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Globex Auto feature fully implemented and tested. Key points: (1) globex_auto_enabled toggles Globex session trading (18:00 ET → 09:25 ET). (2) When enabled during Globex hours, session_type='globex', exchange_status='Globex', can_trade=true. (3) globex_flatten_before_ny_minutes configures auto-flatten before NYSE open (default 5 min). (4) Frontend button at data-testid='globex-auto-btn' with cyan highlight when active. (5) Info box and flatten input appear conditionally. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_globex_auto.py

feature_verification.GET /api/trading-calendar/status session: Working - returns 'globex' when Globex enabled and in hours
feature_verification.Frontend Globex info box: Working - shows '18:00 ET → 09:25 ET' when enabled

mocked_api_note: SignalStack webhook is MOCKED. All trading calendar logic is REAL using exchange_calendars library.

current_time_context.note: Tests run during Globex session (18:00-09:25 ET), NYSE closed
